message: 🆘 आपातकालीन: एम्स दिल्ली में एक गंभीर सिर की चोट वाले मरीज के लिए 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड तुरंत चाहिए। मरीज कोमा में है। कृपया 9811122233 पर संपर्क करें!
message_english: 🆘 Emergency: 3 units O+ blood needed immediately for a severe head injury patient at AIIMS Delhi. Patient is in a coma. Please contact 9811122233!

message: सफदरजंग अस्पताल के ट्रॉमा वार्ड में AB- रक्त की 2 यूनिट की सख्त जरूरत है। मरीज की हालत बहुत गंभीर है। कोई डोनर हो तो जल्दी आएं।
message_english: 2 units of AB- blood is strictly needed in the trauma ward of Safdarjung Hospital. The patient's condition is very critical. If there is a donor, please come quickly.

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में भारी रक्तस्राव के कारण 4 यूनिट B+ ब्लड अभी चाहिए। मरीज की जान जा सकती है। कृपया मदद करें 9988776655
message_english: 4 units B+ blood needed right now due to heavy bleeding at Apollo Chennai. Patient may lose his life. Please help 9988776655

message: KEM मुंबई में एक नवजात शिशु को तुरंत 1 यूनिट A- ब्लड की जरूरत है। कृपया इसे ग्रुप्स में भेजें और डोनर खोजें।
message_english: A newborn baby needs 1 unit A- blood immediately at KEM Mumbai. Please send this to groups and find a donor.

message: मेदांता में मल्टीपल ऑर्गन फेल्योर के कारण 5 यूनिट O- खून की अर्जेंट आवश्यकता है। डोनर्स प्लीज जल्दी अस्पताल पहुंचें। 8888000011
message_english: 5 units O- blood is urgently required due to multiple organ failure at Medanta. Donors please reach the hospital quickly. 8888000011

message: CMC वेल्लोर में भीषण कार दुर्घटना के शिकार व्यक्ति के लिए 2 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड चाहिए। जिंदगी और मौत का सवाल है, कृपया आगे आएं।
message_english: 2 units AB+ blood needed for a victim of a fatal car crash at CMC Vellore. It's a matter of life and death, please come forward.

message: फोर्टिस गुड़गांव में आज रात कार्डियक अरेस्ट की सर्जरी है। 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड का इंतजाम करना है। डोनर कृपया मुझे मैसेज करें।
message_english: Cardiac arrest surgery tonight at Fortis Gurgaon. Need to arrange 2 units A+ blood. Donor please message me.

message: पीजीआईएमईआर चंडीगढ़ में गंभीर एनीमिया के कारण हीमोग्लोबिन 5 रह गया है। 3 यूनिट B- ब्लड जल्द से जल्द चाहिए। 7000070000
message_english: Hemoglobin has dropped to 5 due to severe anemia at PGIMER Chandigarh. 3 units B- blood needed as soon as possible. 7000070000

message: मैक्स साकेत में ट्यूमर से ब्लीडिंग हो रही है। कल सुबह तक 2 यूनिट O+ ब्लड चाहिए। मदद करें।
message_english: Bleeding from tumor at Max Saket. Need 2 units O+ blood by tomorrow morning. Please help.

message: नारायणा बैंगलोर में एक दुर्लभ बीमारी के इलाज के लिए 1 यूनिट AB- ब्लड की तुरंत आवश्यकता है। कृपया संपर्क करें।
message_english: 1 unit AB- blood is immediately required for the treatment of a rare disease at Narayana Bangalore. Please contact.

message: सर गंगा राम अस्पताल में लिवर डैमेज के मरीज के लिए 2 यूनिट B+ खून चाहिए। आज रात डोनर अस्पताल आ सकते हैं तो बताएं। 9123491234
message_english: 2 units B+ blood needed for liver damage patient at Sir Ganga Ram hospital. Please tell if donors can come to the hospital tonight. 9123491234

message: लीलावती मुंबई में इमीडिएट ट्रांसफ्यूजन के लिए 1 यूनिट O- ब्लड चाहिए। कृपया इसे अपने जान-पहचान वालों को भेजें।
message_english: 1 unit O- blood needed for immediate transfusion at Lilavati Mumbai. Please send this to your acquaintances.

message: KIMS हैदराबाद में मेरी पत्नी का सिजेरियन ऑपरेशन अगले सोमवार को है। डॉक्टर ने 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड सुरक्षित रखने को कहा है।
message_english: My wife's cesarean operation is next Monday at KIMS Hyderabad. The doctor has asked to keep 2 units A+ blood safe.

message: एम्स दिल्ली में बोन मैरो ट्रांसप्लांट की तैयारी के लिए 1 यूनिट B+ खून चाहिए। गुरुवार को डोनर की आवश्यकता है। 9090909090
message_english: 1 unit B+ blood needed for bone marrow transplant prep at AIIMS Delhi. Donor is required on Thursday. 9090909090

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में बाईपास सर्जरी तय हुई है। अगले हफ्ते के लिए 2 यूनिट O+ ब्लड चाहिए। डोनर्स संपर्क करें।
message_english: Bypass surgery scheduled at Apollo Chennai. Need 2 units O+ blood for next week. Donors please contact.

message: सफदरजंग अस्पताल में इस शुक्रवार को डायलिसिस के दौरान 1 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड बैंक में जमा करना है। कृपया मदद करें।
message_english: Need to deposit 1 unit AB+ in the blood bank during dialysis this Friday at Safdarjung hospital. Please help.

message: इस रविवार दिल्ली के रामलीला मैदान में रक्तदान जागरूकता शिविर का आयोजन हो रहा है। आप सभी सपरिवार आमंत्रित हैं।
message_english: A blood donation awareness camp is being organized this Sunday at Ramlila Maidan, Delhi. You all are invited with family.

message: मुंबई में कल रात B- ब्लड देने वाले फरिश्ते को दिल से शुक्रिया। आपके कारण एक जिंदगी बच गई।
message_english: Heartfelt thanks to the angel who gave B- blood last night in Mumbai. A life was saved because of you.

message: क्या ब्लड प्रेशर की दवा खाने वाले लोग रक्तदान कर सकते हैं? अगर किसी को पता हो तो कृपया जानकारी साझा करें।
message_english: Can people taking blood pressure medication donate blood? If anyone knows, please share the information.

message: चंडीगढ़ रेड क्रॉस ब्लड बैंक में इस शनिवार डोनर रजिस्ट्रेशन ड्राइव है। कृपया आएं और अपना नाम दर्ज कराएं।
message_english: There is a donor registration drive at Chandigarh Red Cross Blood Bank this Saturday. Please come and register your name.

message: Bhaiyo Fortis Gurgaon me B+ ki urgent jarurat hai. Accident case in ICU, 3 units chahiye jaldi! Pls aao 9812345678
message_english: Brothers, urgent need of B+ in Fortis Gurgaon. Accident case in ICU, 3 units needed quickly! Pls come 9812345678

message: Medanta me A- blood chahiye URGENT. Internal bleeding ho rhi hai, 2 unit arrange karni hai next 1 hour me.
message_english: A- blood needed URGENT at Medanta. Internal bleeding is happening, have to arrange 2 units in the next 1 hour.

message: KEM Mumbai me patient sink ho raha hai. 4 units O- blood ki ekdum immediate need hai. Pura group share kare 🆘

message: Critical baby at CMC Vellore! AB- blood 1 unit urgently chahiye. Doctor bol rhe time nahi hai. Pls contact 9999900000
message_english: Critical baby at CMC Vellore! AB- blood 1 unit needed urgently. Doctor is saying there is no time. Pls contact 9999900000

message: Massive crash on highway, 5 units O+ needed at KIMS Hyderabad emergency ward. Jiske paas bhi O+ hai pls bhago hospital.
message_english: Massive crash on highway, 5 units O+ needed at KIMS Hyderabad emergency ward. Whoever has O+, pls run to the hospital.

message: Narayana Bangalore me patient ka heart fail ho rha hai. 2 unit A+ blood chahiye abhi ke abhi. Save a life pls.
message_english: Patient's heart is failing at Narayana Bangalore. 2 units A+ blood needed right now. Save a life pls.

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me urgent operation chal rha hai, 3 unit B- blood ki zarurat aan padi hai! Koi aao pls! 8888877777
message_english: Urgent operation is going on at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi, suddenly 3 units B- blood is needed! Someone come pls! 8888877777

message: Lilavati Mumbai me delivery ke baad heavy hemorrhage. 4 unit AB+ blood ki zaroorat hai in next 30 mins. RT urgently.
message_english: Heavy hemorrhage after delivery at Lilavati Mumbai. Need 4 units AB+ blood in next 30 mins. RT urgently.

message: Max Saket me poison case aaya hai, condition extreme bad hai. 2 unit O+ chahiye turant blood change ke liye.
message_english: Poison case has come at Max Saket, condition is extremely bad. 2 units O+ needed immediately for blood change.

message: Dengue severe ho gaya hai chacha ji ka, AIIMS Delhi me 2 unit B+ chahiye by evening. Drop a text at 7777766666
message_english: Uncle's dengue has become severe, 2 units B+ needed at AIIMS Delhi by evening. Drop a text at 7777766666

message: Apollo Chennai me chemo chal rha hai, count drop ho gaya. 1 unit A+ required hai kal subah. Kisi ko lead pata hai?
message_english: Chemo is going on at Apollo Chennai, count has dropped. 1 unit A+ is required tomorrow morning. Anyone knows a lead?

message: Safdarjung me operation kal subah hona hai, 3 unit O- blood ka prabandh karna hai. Please help out dosto.
message_english: Operation is to happen tomorrow morning at Safdarjung, have to arrange 3 units O- blood. Please help out friends.

message: Urgent transplant hai PGIMER Chandigarh me aaj shaam ko. 2 unit AB- chahiye donor. Blood bank empty hai. Call 9988998899
message_english: Urgent transplant this evening at PGIMER Chandigarh. Need 2 units AB- donor. Blood bank is empty. Call 9988998899

message: KEM Mumbai me patient admitted hai, severe weakness and hb 4 pe aa gaya. 1 unit B- chahiye jaldi. DM me.
message_english: Patient admitted in KEM Mumbai, severe weakness and hb has come to 4. Need 1 unit B- quickly. DM me.

message: Gastric bleeding rukk nahi rahi hai CMC Vellore me. 2 unit O+ blood chahiye raat 8 baje tak. Please check and tell.
message_english: Gastric bleeding is not stopping at CMC Vellore. Need 2 units O+ blood by 8 PM tonight. Please check and tell.

message: Narayana Bangalore me urgent bypass honi hai tomorrow. 3 unit A- blood chahiye reserve me rakhne ke liye. Pls help guys.
message_english: Urgent bypass is to happen tomorrow at Narayana Bangalore. 3 units A- blood needed to keep in reserve. Pls help guys.

message: Sir Ganga Ram hospital Delhi me acute liver failure. 2 unit B+ required urgently aaj hi. Contact 9123491234
message_english: Acute liver failure at Sir Ganga Ram hospital Delhi. 2 units B+ required urgently today itself. Contact 9123491234

message: KIMS Hyderabad me blood count achanak drop ho gaya. 1 unit AB+ chahiye kal dopehar tak for safe side.

message: Lilavati Mumbai me uncle ka routine transfusion hona hai is friday. 1 unit A+ blood chahiye hoga. Any leads?
message_english: Uncle's routine transfusion is to happen this friday at Lilavati Mumbai. 1 unit A+ blood will be needed. Any leads?

message_english: Planned kidney stone operation at Fortis Gurgaon in 4 days. Have to deposit 2 units B+ in the blood bank. Call 8000080000

message: Max Saket me 1 unit AB- blood replacement karni hai wednesday tak. Kisi ka free time ho toh please batana.
message_english: Have to do 1 unit AB- blood replacement at Max Saket by wednesday. If anyone has free time please tell.

message: Upcoming tumor removal surgery ke liye PGIMER Chandigarh me 2 unit O- blood ka arrangement chahiye aane wale somvaar ke liye.
message_english: Need arrangement of 2 units O- blood for upcoming tumor removal surgery at PGIMER Chandigarh for the coming monday.

message: Apollo Chennai me scheduled chemo support ke liye 1 unit A- chahiye is weekend. Koi Chennai ka donor help kar do.
message_english: 1 unit A- needed this weekend for scheduled chemo support at Apollo Chennai. Some Chennai donor please help.

message: Delhi walo, is sunday Vasant Kunj me blood camp hai. Refreshment and certificate free milega. Jarur aao donate karne.
message_english: Delhi folks, this sunday there is a blood camp in Vasant Kunj. Refreshment and certificate will be free. Definitely come to donate.

message: Hyderabad me jin bhi logo ne A+ diya unko bada wala Thank You! Dadi ab bilkul theek hain ghar aa gyi.
message_english: A big Thank You to all those who gave A+ in Hyderabad! Grandma is completely fine now and came home.

message: Alcohol consume karne ke kitne hours baad blood donate kar sakte hain? Mumbai me donation karna hai kal. Any idea?
message_english: How many hours after consuming alcohol can one donate blood? Have to donate in Mumbai tomorrow. Any idea?

message: Bangalore me reliable blood banks ka koi contact info hai kisi ke paas? Ek list banani hai society ke liye.
message_english: Does anyone have contact info of reliable blood banks in Bangalore? Have to make a list for the society.

message: Youth ko aage aana chahiye! Har 3 mahine me ek baar donate zaroor kare. Chennai ke sabhi dosto ko tag karo.
message_english: Youth should come forward! Definitely donate once every 3 months. Tag all friends of Chennai.

message: Humari company Gurgaon me kal blood drive organise kar rahi hai Red Cross ke sath. Apne friends aur family ko le aao.
message_english: Our company is organizing a blood drive tomorrow in Gurgaon with Red Cross. Bring your friends and family.
